_meta.purpose: Maps each of the 17 lattice-study tasks (id ends -t1) to public GitHub URLs for the fixture files it references, in HamzaYM/reliable-ai-skills. Regenerated 2026-07-13 to point at the newly materialized, browsable file tree (eval/fixtures-built/) instead of the script-anchored fallbacks used by the prior pass.

publication_status.explanation: eval/fixtures-built/ was published: branch 'fixtures-built' (commit dc9de24a368022110038ade7d098b6486d99f8d9) was pushed and merged to main via PR #1 on 2026-07-14, with hamza's explicit OK. The file.url values below (blob/main/...) are live.
publication_status.url_ref_note: file.url uses blob/main/..., confirmed resolving (200) for spot-checked files (appointments.py, charges.md) after merge.

materialized_tree.what: Generated read-only snapshot of each fixture's built working tree (working files only; .git history and bare *-origin.git remotes omitted). The source of truth remains the generator scripts under eval/fixtures/, which the harness runs; eval/fixtures-built/ is not read by the harness. See eval/fixtures-built/README.md.
materialized_tree.determinism: Builds are deterministic; tree hashes and git SHAs match each fixture's manifest.json.
materialized_tree.synthetic: All content is synthetic/invented; the .env and token values are fake trap states (e.g. 'synthetic-signing-key', '..._SYNTHETIC0000').

verification.structural: COMPLETE: all 72 head-referenced file paths exist in commit dc9de24a368022110038ade7d098b6486d99f8d9 at their eval/fixtures-built/<fixture>/<repo>/<path> location; the materialized tree is byte-identical to the deterministic build output.
verification.live_http_200: CONFIRMED: spot-checked appointments.py and charges.md via curl -sSI, both return HTTP 200 after the PR #1 merge.
verification.non_head_files: 2 of 74 referenced files (farch-t1: carelog-api/deploy/edgerunner.toml and backend/serverless_handler.py) exist only in git history, not at HEAD, so they are not in the materialized working tree; their url stays the generator-script anchor and materialized=false.

_meta.fields_per_file: path; url (materialized blob URL for head files, else the generator-script anchor); materialized (bool); materialized_path (repo-relative under eval/fixtures-built, or null); source_script(_url), anchor_line, evidence{...}; literal_blob_url_does_not_resolve (the naive eval/fixtures/... path, kept for transparency); resolved_from_description (if the task named the path only descriptively).

files.materialized_reason: referenced in git history, not at HEAD; absent from the materialized working tree; url kept as the generator-script anchor
referenced in git history, not at HEAD; absent from the materialized working tree; url kept as the generator-script anchor
